description: CircuitBreakerCell — Closed/Open/HalfOpen state machine over a sliding window. failures reaching failure_threshold in the last N calls trip Closed->Open (open_until = now + reset_timeout); Open fast-fails until the deadline then Open->HalfOpen on the next allow; a HalfOpen success closes the breaker. window N=3, failure_threshold=2, reset_timeout=5.
